name: GO FKN FAST
short_description: GO FKN FAST is a speedy 2D platformer, where the goal is to complete each level as fast as possible. Use power-ups like the Dash Orb to get blistering bursts of speed, or Jump Orbs to help you reach greater heights. Wall jump, dive, dash, and double jump through 45 different levels!
detailed_description:
GO FKN FAST is a speedy 2D platformer, where the goal is to complete each level as fast as possible. Use power-ups like the Dash Orb to get blistering bursts of speed, or Jump Orbs to help you reach greater heights. Wall jump, dive, dash, and double jump through 45 different levels in the shortest time you can!

GO FKN FAST was created by Jason Roberts, a solo developer. This is their first-ever published video game. Try GO FKN FAST, and then let them know what you think of it by leaving a review!

Thank you for the support!! :O)
